spec.name: Aurapulse
spec.summary: Temporarily enhances an object with a vibrant aura that resonates with the essence of its soul, allowing it to emit a soft, ethereal glow.
spec.effect_description: Temporarily enhances an object with a vibrant aura that resonates with the essence of its soul, allowing it to emit a soft, ethereal glow. A circle filter/control recipe that channels soul discipline into soul output. It applies a point pattern against object across self reach with timed short persistence.
